name: auth_login_malformed_truncated_object
_note: Malformed JSON (syntax error). Node's Express strict body-parser rejects it BEFORE the request-id middleware -> 400 with request_id:'' (empty); Go's chi request-id middleware always runs first -> 400 with a real request_id. status_only pins the agreed 400 (refuting #33's 'Go 400 vs Node 500' premise) without asserting the request_id-presence divergence (Node body-parser ordering accident, same root as #57). See #33.
